zh.lifeSummary: 當Bethoc nic Gille Crist於1184年1月1日出生在蘇格蘭Forfarshire福爾法爾時，她的父親Gille Crist 4th Earl of Angus30歲，母親Marjorie of Huntingdon32歲。她和Walter Stewart 3rd High Steward of Scotland至少有4個兒子和1個女兒。她去世於1270年在她的家鄉享年86歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Bethoc nic Gille Crist于1184年1月1日出生在苏格兰Forfarshire福爾法爾时，她的父亲Gille Crist 4th Earl of Angus30岁，母亲Marjorie of Huntingdon32岁。她和Walter Stewart 3rd High Steward of Scotland至少有4个儿子和1个女儿。她去世于1270年在她的家乡享年86岁。

nameMeanings.name: nic
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Nick, a pet form of Nichol and Nicholas .
South German: from a pet form of the personal name Nikolaus (see Nicholas ).
Americanized form of various like-sounding Jewish surnames.

variants.name: Negus
meanings: English: perhaps from an unrecorded Middle English personal name Nikecus, Nikus (a pet fom of Nicol(e), male or female) + the hypcoristic suffix -cus. See Nick , Nichol . In the modern form of this name, the voicing of /k/ to /g/ may have been encouraged by false association with the word Negus meaning ‘emperor of Ethiopia’ (see 3 below), which appears first in 1594 and 1613 in East Anglian authors as neguz.

Romanian (Neguş): from Neguş, a diminutive of the personal name Neagu, a short form of any of various South Slavic personal names composed of the element neg ‘to take care of, to nurse’, e.g. Negomir (Romanian Neagomir).

Ethiopian: from the personal name Negus, meaning e.g. ‘king’ in the Amharic language. — Note: Since Ethiopians do not have hereditary surnames, this name was registered as such only after immigration of its bearers to the US.

variants.name: Neck
meanings: English: nickname from Middle English necke ‘neck’ (Old English hnecca), denoting someone with some peculiarity of the neck. Symon Chortneke, i.e. ‘short neck’, is probably identical with Symon Nekeles, i.e. ‘neckless’, both recorded in 1275 in the Norfolk Hundred Rolls.
English: perhaps also a variant of   Nick  .
German: from Neck, the name of a water sprite.

variants.name: Nichol
meanings: Scottish and northern English: from the Middle English personal name Nic(h)ol(e), a vernacular form of Nic(h)olas (see Nicholas ). Compare Nickel and Nicol .

In some cases also an American shortened and altered form of Greek Nikolas , its variant Nicolas , or of any of various derivatives of the personal name Nikola(o)s ‘Nicholas’, including Nikolis (see Nicoli ). Compare Nicholas and Nicol .

variants.name: Nickens
meanings: Apparently a patronymic from a pet form of   Nick  .

nameMeanings.name: Gille
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Gisele, Pierre.
French: variant of   Gilles  .
German: variant of   Gill  .

variants.name: Gilles
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French/Haitian Jacques, Pierre, Amie, Arsene, Berthony, Ghislaine, Gilles, Jean Marie, Jean-Baptiste, Maryse, Maxime, Odette.

French, Walloon, and Haitian: from the French personal name Gilles of which the original form was Latin Aegidius. This was the name of a 7th-century Provençal hermit, whose cult popularized the name in a variety of more or less mutilated forms: Gidi and Gidy in southern France, Gil(l)i in the area of the Alpes-Maritimes, and Gil(l)e elsewhere. This last form was taken over to England by the Normans (see Giles 1).
German: from the personal name Gilius, from Aegilius, a Late Latin variant of Aegidius (see Giles 1).

nameMeanings.name: Crist
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: apparently a nickname from Middle English Crist, Old English Crīst ‘Christ’ (see Christ ), possibly applied as a nickname for someone who played the part of Christ in a pageant.
English: from a pet form of the personal names   Christian   or   Christopher  .
Americanized form of German, Dutch, Czech, or Slovak   Krist   and German or Dutch   Christ  .

variants.name: Crest
meanings: English: possibly a variant of   Crist  .

variants.name: Criste
meanings: German and English: variant of   Crist  .

variants.name: Christ
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Fritz, Kurt, Erwin, Franz, Georg, Gerhard, Heinz, Inge, Klaus, Liselotte, Udo.

German and Dutch: from a short form of the personal name Christian , or a nickname meaning ‘the Christian’. In both cases it is (ultimately) from the Latin name Christus ‘Christ’, which is from Greek Christos, a derivative of chriein ‘to anoint’, a calque of Hebrew mashiaḥ ‘Messiah’, which likewise means literally ‘the anointed’. This is the title given to Jesus of Nazareth (see Jesus ), as embodying the fulfilment of Messianic prophecy and expectation; he is the central figure of Christianity and most Christians believe he is the incarnation of God the Son. Compare Chrest , Crist , Ghrist , and Krist .
English: variant of   Crist  , a cognate of 1 above.

en.lifeSummary: When Bethoc nic Gille Crist was born on 1 January 1184, in Forfar, Forfarshire, Scotland, her father, Gille Crist 4th Earl of Angus, was 30 and her mother, Marjorie of Huntingdon, was 32. She had at least 4 sons and 1 daughter with Walter Stewart 3rd High Steward of Scotland. She died in 1270, in her hometown, at the age of 86.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Bethoc nic Gille Crist est née le 1 janvier 1184, à Forfar, Forfarshire, Écosse, son père, Gille Crist 4th Earl of Angus, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Marjorie of Huntingdon, avait 32 ans. Elle a eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille avec Walter Stewart 3rd High Steward of Scotland. Elle est décédée en 1270, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 86 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Bethoc nic Gille Crist am 1. Januar 1184 in Forfar, Forfarshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Gille Crist 4th Earl of Angus 30 und ihre Mutter Marjorie of Huntingdon 32. Sie hatte mit Walter Stewart 3rd High Steward of Scotland mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1270 im Alter von 86 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Bethoc nic Gille Crist è nata il il 1 gennaio 1184 nel Forfar, Forfarshire, Scotland, sua padre, Gille Crist 4th Earl of Angus, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Marjorie of Huntingdon, aveva 32 anni. Lei avuto almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia con Walter Stewart 3rd High Steward of Scotland. Morì nel 1270, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 86 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Bethoc nic Gille Cristが1184年1月1日にスコットランドForfarshireフォーファルで生まれた時，父Gille Crist 4th Earl of Angusは30歳，母Marjorie of Huntingdonは32歳であった。彼女はWalter Stewart 3rd High Steward of Scotlandとの間に少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1270年に故郷で86歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Bethoc nic Gille Crist(이)가 1184년 1월 1일 스컷랜드 Forfarshire 포파르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Gille Crist 4th Earl of Angus(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Marjorie of Huntingdon(은)는 32세였다. 그녀는 Walter Stewart 3rd High Steward of Scotland(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1270년 그녀의 고향에서 86세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Bethoc nic Gille Crist nasceu em 1 de janeiro de 1184, em Forfar, Forfarshire, Scotland, seu pai, Gille Crist 4th Earl of Angus, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Marjorie of Huntingdon, tinha 32 anos. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Bethoc nic Gille Crist родилась 1 января 1184 г. в местности форфар, Forfarshire, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Gille Crist 4th Earl of Angus было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Marjorie of Huntingdon, 32. У неё было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь от Walter Stewart 3rd High Steward of Scotland. Она умерла в 1270 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 86 лет.

Tuvo por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija con Walter Stewart 3rd High Steward of Scotland. Murió en 1270, en su pueblo, a la edad de 86 años.
